lanes.name: built_in_smoke
lanes.description: Small local set of simple expected names plus unsupported negative controls.

lanes.name: bluebook_examples
lanes.description: Future lane for examples extracted directly from the canonical Blue Book V3 PDF/source sections.

lanes.name: chebi_curated
lanes.description: Future lane for ChEBI monthly TSV/SDF exports. ChEBI is curated and useful for validation, but names are not guaranteed to be strict PINs.

lanes.name: pubchem_computed
lanes.description: Future large-scale pressure-test lane. PubChem IUPAC names are useful for differential testing but should not be treated as human gold truth.
